description_long: This is a thick, rectangular paperback book with a glossy, predominantly white cover featuring blue and black accent colors. The front cover displays a large, circular blue graphic and several smaller design elements, giving it a modern, technical appearance. The spine is blue with white and yellow sections, and contains bold, white text along with a red accent at the bottom. The back cover is mostly white with a black vertical panel and several blue and gray circular graphics, as well as a barcode. The book's pages are visible along the sides, showing a dense, tightly bound block of white paper. The overall design suggests a technical or educational subject matter, with a clean and professional layout.
description: A thick, modern paperback book with a glossy white, blue, and black cover featuring circular graphics and bold spine text. The design is clean and technical, with visible dense white pages.
description_view_0: The spine of the book is prominent, showing blue, white, and red color blocks with bold white text.
description_view_1: The front cover is visible, featuring a large blue circle and several smaller design elements on a white background.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the opposite side, showing the back cover with a black vertical panel and blue circular graphics.
description_view_3: The back cover is most visible, displaying a white background with a black panel, blue graphics, and a barcode.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a large, circular blue graphic with several smaller geometric elements, giving it a modern and technical look. The design is clean and abstract, with no figurative imagery.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is primarily blue with white and yellow sections, featuring bold white text oriented vertically and a red accent at the bottom. The design is clean and modern, matching the front cover's style.
